description: In the morning briefing leads section, flagged Alcon and AECom as 'unassigned' leads needing action. The '---' value in the 'Passed To' column means the lead is dead/closed — not unassigned. Jarvis treated dead leads as actionable items.
correction: '---' in the lead tracker means dead/not going to be assigned. Only truly blank 'Passed To' fields are unassigned leads. Alcon and AECom should not have been surfaced.
systemic_fix: Update lead review logic: '---' = dead lead, skip entirely. Only surface leads where 'Passed To' is blank/empty/null — not '---'.
